case_title: RAYMOND LEWIS VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, RAYMOND ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-29-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND LEWIS APPEARED. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY IKE OKWUOSA, PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHEIK HEARING THE MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LEWIS, RAYMOND JOHN STEWART COMPANY

DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY IKE OKWUOSA, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
